[Calling write_report(title="Dr. Martinez - Compassionate Use Dosing Summary", content="# Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary

**Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)

## Patient Summary

| Patient ID | Age (months) | Weight (kg) | Ordered Dose (mg/kg) | Nominal Per-Dose Amount* | Frequency | Next Dose | PK Clearance (mL/min) | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|
| CU-001 | 34 | 12.4 | 0.15 | 1.86 mg | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 | Stable. Tumor regression 22% at last scan. |
| CU-002 | 18 | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 mg | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |
| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 mg | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |

\*Nominal per-dose amount is a simple calculation from `weight_kg × dose_mg_kg`; final clinical preparation/rounding should follow site protocol.

## Quick Takeaways
- Three active compassionate-use patients are listed in the current dosing config.
- Two patients (CU-001, CU-002) are on **q3w** dosing; one patient (CU-003) is on **q2w** dosing.
- The next upcoming dose is **CU-003 on 2026-04-10**.
- No obvious inconsistencies were apparent in the dosing parameter file itself.", recipients="")]Yes — I pulled the latest dosing parameters and saved a quick summary for Dr. Martinez.

Quick summary:
- CU-001: 12.4 kg, 0.15 mg/kg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-14, PK clearance 3.2 mL/min
  - Derived nominal dose: 1.86 mg
  - Note: Stable; 22% tumor regression at last scan
- CU-002: 9.1 kg, 0.12 mg/kg, q3w, next dose 2026-04-12, PK clearance 2.8 mL/min
  - Derived nominal dose: 1.09 mg
  - Note: Responding well; weight gain improving
- CU-003: 15.7 kg, 0.18 mg/kg, q2w, next dose 2026-04-10, PK clearance 4.1 mL/min
  - Derived nominal dose: 2.83 mg
  - Note: New enrollment; first dose given 2026-03-27

On the PK models: based on this check, the dosing config looks present and internally consistent, but I did not run or validate the PK models themselves. So I can say there’s no obvious issue in the current parameter file, but I can’t confirm model stability from this file alone.

If you want, I can next do a targeted check of the PK model inputs/configs.
